business.name: Elite Landscaping
business.serviceArea: Bainbridge Island & North Seattle — Ballard, Magnolia, Queen Anne, Fremont, Wallingford, Phinney Ridge, Green Lake
business.about: A design-forward landscaping studio serving Bainbridge Island and the north Seattle neighborhoods. From full landscape installs and hardscape to year-round maintenance — we build it right and keep it looking that way through every PNW season.

services.name: Landscape Design + Install
services.description: Site assessment, plant selection suited to PNW soil and light conditions, drainage plan, and full installation. We design for year-round interest, not just spring color.

services.name: Lawn Maintenance
services.description: Weekly or bi-weekly mowing, edging, blowing, and seasonal adjustments. No skip weeks, no missed appointments — consistent crew who know your property.

services.name: Hardscaping — Patios & Walls
services.description: Natural stone, concrete paver, and modular block patios, walkways, and retaining walls. Properly graded and compacted base, built to handle Seattle freeze-thaw cycles.

services.name: Irrigation Install & Repair
services.description: Zone-by-zone drip and spray system design, installation, and seasonal startup/shutdown. Smart controller upgrades available — saves water and keeps your investment alive.

services.name: Tree & Shrub Care
services.description: Pruning, shaping, crown thinning, and removal of dead or hazardous material. ISA-certified arborist consultation available for large or protected trees.

services.name: Seasonal Cleanup
services.description: Spring and fall cleanups including leaf removal, bed edging, mulch application, and pruning spent perennials. Keeps the property looking intentional all year.

testimonials.name: Laura P.
testimonials.text: They designed our back garden around our drainage problem instead of pretending it didn't exist. Two years later it drains perfectly and looks better every season.

testimonials.name: James W.
testimonials.text: Patio install was a major project — retaining wall, steps, lighting. One crew managed the whole thing. The base prep alone was more thorough than anything I'd seen before.

testimonials.name: Caitlin B.
testimonials.text: Monthly maintenance crew actually knows our property — they don't need instructions each time. The lawn has never looked this consistent.

testimonials.name: Ryan M.
testimonials.text: Seasonal cleanups are worth every dollar. They mulch the beds, edge everything, and haul away every leaf. Takes the whole chore off my plate.

process.title: Consult
process.description: We walk the property, assess sun, soil, drainage, and your goals — then deliver a design concept with a clear written estimate.

process.title: Design
process.description: Plant selection for PNW conditions, hardscape layout, and drainage plan. We design for longevity, not just the day of install.

process.title: Install
process.description: Experienced install crews with proper equipment. Clean job site, daily progress updates, and no shortcuts on base prep or plant spacing.

process.title: Maintain
process.description: Year-round maintenance plans keep your investment looking the way it did on install day. Same crew, same property, consistent results.

chatbot.greeting: Hi — Elite Landscaping's consultant here. Tell me about your project and I'll point you toward the right service and a rough budget range.
qualifyingQuestions: Is this a new install, ongoing maintenance, or a hardscape project?
Roughly how large is the area — front yard, back yard, or full property?
Do you have any drainage or slope challenges on the site?
chatbot.customInstructions: Anchor on design-forward approach, PNW plant and drainage expertise, and year-round maintenance commitment. Reference hardscape longevity and irrigation smart-controller water savings when relevant. Steer installs toward a site consultation before quoting specific numbers.

persona.name: Olivia
persona.title: Landscape Consultant
persona.proactiveBubbleText: Hi — new landscape install, maintenance plan, or a patio project? I can help.

faqs.question: Do you do ongoing maintenance?
faqs.answer: Yes — weekly and bi-weekly maintenance plans starting at $149/month. Same crew every visit.

faqs.question: Can you handle drainage problems?
faqs.answer: Yes — we assess drainage before every install and design around it rather than ignoring it.

faqs.question: What's included in a seasonal cleanup?
faqs.answer: Leaf removal, bed edging, mulch application, and pruning spent perennials. Spring and fall.

faqs.question: Do you install irrigation?
faqs.answer: Yes — full system design, installation, and seasonal startup/shutdown. Smart controller upgrades available.
